one_time_description: Correction of an error - unrecorded receivable from prior year (Outlands revenue and portfolio investments) restated to accumulated surplus
economic_notes: First Nation receives gaming revenue distributions from Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) based on 1.7% of aggregate provincial gross gaming revenues. Holds minority interests in multiple limited partnerships including First Nation LP, 2472881 Ontario Limited, Opiikapawiin Holdings Inc., and 601 Canarctic Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unaudited limited partnership statements (earnings from limited partnership investment cannot be verified). Prior year figures restated for correction of error (unrecorded Outlands receivable of $154,790 and portfolio investments of $45). Fiscal year is 2022 not 2024 as stated in document. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated on balance sheet in provided text. Accounts receivable includes due from government ($920,252), trade and other receivables ($318,284). Current liabilities include accounts payable ($381,706) and funding repayable ($736,143). Nation is economically dependent on ISC and FNIH for 76% of revenue. Capital Funds expenses of $716,166 not categorized into housing or infrastructure specifically.
